name: Old Fashioned Baked Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound smoked ham, bacon or salt pork, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Completely soften the beans before proceeding.
2. Suggest pressure cooking them to soften completely.
3. Drain and stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Pour into a Crock-Pot.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 12 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
Note: Beans must be softened completely before combining with sugar and/or acidic foods, as these have a hardening effect on beans and will prevent further softening.
Serves 8
